message:
style(harness,runtime,web): apply rustfmt formatting across 4 files

Reformat long assert! macro calls in baseline_capture tests to use
multi-line style for readability. Collapse ProfilingMode::ALL array
to single-line form in hotspot_extraction. Inline short function
call arguments in subscription shutdown and fix indentation of
chained method access in pane_pointer_capture test.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
